title: Fix nested subgraph rendering for 3+ levels in draw_mermaid with xray=True

entities.name: draw_mermaid
entities.description: A function or tool responsible for drawing Mermaid diagrams.

entities.name: Nested Subgraph Rendering
entities.description: The capability of rendering subgraphs that are contained within other subgraphs.

entities.name: Xray Mode
entities.description: A specific operational mode or parameter (`xray=True`) for the `draw_mermaid` function.

entities.name: Rendering Bug
entities.description: An issue causing incorrect display of nested subgraphs, specifically for 3 or more levels.

relations.label: AFFECTS
relations.evidence: Fix nested subgraph rendering for 3+ levels in draw_mermaid

extracted_data.summary: This issue addresses a rendering bug in the `draw_mermaid` function that affects nested subgraphs with 3 or more levels when `xray=True` is enabled.
